name: @aahoughton/oav-express4
description: Express 4 adapter for @aahoughton/oav-core. Ships a request-validator middleware factory plus standalone helpers (httpRequestFromExpress, renderProblemDetails) for callers that want to compose their own.
author: Andrew Houghton <aah@roarmouse.org>

scripts.prepack: node -e "if((process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'').startsWith('npm/'))throw Error('Use pnpm pack: npm pack does not rewrite workspace:* deps.')" && tsup && node ../../scripts/pack-devdeps.mjs strip

//: No prepublishOnly: release.yml runs `pnpm test` from root before `pnpm -r publish`. Per-package publish (`cd packages/<x> && pnpm publish`) is not the supported path; it would skip the test gate.
